# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: CI/CD Pipeline - Continuous Delivery

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 5
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  checkout-and-cache:
    name: Checkout & Cache Dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    outputs:
      cache-hit: ${{ steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit

  vulnerability-scan:
    name: Security & Vulnerability Scan
    needs: checkout-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies if cache miss
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          fi

      - name: Run npm audit for known vulnerabilities
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: javascript-typescript
          queries: security-and-quality

      - name: Autobuild for CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/autobuild@v3

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
        with:
          category: "/language:javascript-typescript"

      - name: Run Trivy filesystem scan
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: '.'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'

      - name: Upload Trivy scan results to GitHub Security
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3
        if: always()
        with:
          sarif_file: 'trivy-results.sarif'

      - name: Check for secrets in codebase
        uses: trufflesecurity/trufflehog@main
        with:
          extra_args: --only-verified

  lint-and-typecheck:
    name: Lint & Type Check
    needs: checkout-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies if cache miss
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          fi

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run type checking
        run: npm run typecheck --if-present

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: checkout-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    strategy:
      fail-fast: true
      matrix:
        shard: [1, 2, 3]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies if cache miss
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          fi

      - name: Run unit and integration tests (shard ${{ matrix.shard }})
        run: npm test -- --shard=${{ matrix.shard }}/3 --coverage --ci
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Upload test coverage
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: coverage-shard-${{ matrix.shard }}
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    needs: [lint-and-typecheck, test, vulnerability-scan]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-deps-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Install dependencies if cache miss
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          fi

      - name: Cache build output
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Generate build metadata
        run: |
          echo "{
            \"commit\": \"${{ github.sha }}\",
            \"ref\": \"${{ github.ref }}\",
            \"build_number\": \"${{ github.run_number }}\",
            \"build_id\": \"${{ github.run_id }}\",
            \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",
            \"actor\": \"${{ github.actor }}\"
          }" > dist/build-metadata.json

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ steps.deploy-staging.outputs.deployment-url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to staging environment
        id: deploy-staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying build ${{ github.sha }} to staging..."
          # Replace with actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # npx serverless deploy --stage staging
          # or: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$STAGING_BUCKET --delete
          # or: kubectl apply -f k8s/staging/
          echo "deployment-url=https://staging.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Run smoke tests against staging
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests against staging..."
          # Replace with actual smoke test commands
          # npx playwright test --config=playwright.smoke.config.ts
          # or: curl -f https://staging.example.com/health || exit 1
          echo "Smoke tests passed"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs: deploy-staging
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ steps.deploy-prod.outputs.deployment-url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify build artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f "dist/build-metadata.json" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Build metadata not found. Aborting deployment."
            exit 1
          fi
          ARTIFACT_COMMIT=$(cat dist/build-metadata.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['commit'])")
          if [ "$ARTIFACT_COMMIT" != "${{ github.sha }}" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Artifact commit mismatch. Expected ${{ github.sha }}, got $ARTIFACT_COMMIT"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build artifact integrity verified for commit ${{ github.sha }}"

      - name: Deploy to production (blue-green)
        id: deploy-prod
        run: |
          echo "Deploying build ${{ github.sha }} to production..."
          # Replace with actual production deployment command
          # Blue-green / canary deployment strategy recommended:
          # npx serverless deploy --stage production
          # or: aws ecs update-service --cluster prod --service app --force-new-deployment
          # or: kubectl set image deployment/app app=registry/app:${{ github.sha }}
          echo "deployment-url=https://www.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Verify production health
        run: |
          echo "Verifying production health..."
          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_DELAY=10
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            echo "Health check attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES..."
            # Replace with actual health check
            # HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://www.example.com/health)
            # if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
            #   echo "Production is healthy"
            #   exit 0
            # fi
            echo "Simulated health check passed"
            exit 0
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done
          echo "ERROR: Production health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
          exit 1

      - name: Create deployment tag
        run: |
          echo "Tagging deployment: deploy-${{ github.run_number }}-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

  rollback:
    name: Rollback Production (on failure)
    needs: deploy-production
    if: failure() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Execute rollback
        run: |
          echo "ALERT: Production deployment failed. Initiating rollback..."
          # Replace with actual rollback commands:
          # aws ecs update-service --cluster prod --service app --task-definition previous-task-def
          # or: kubectl rollout undo deployment/app
          # or: npx serverless rollback --stage production
          echo "Rollback completed"
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Notify team of rollback
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Sending rollback notification..."
          # Replace with actual notification:
          # curl -X POST "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}" \
          #   -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          #   -d "{\"text\":\"🚨 Production rollback triggered for commit ${{ github.sha }} by ${{ github.actor }}. Run: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}\"}"

  notify:
    name: Notify Deployment Status
    needs: [deploy-production]
    if: always() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Determine deployment status
        id: status
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.deploy-production.result }}" = "success" ]; then
            echo "status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=✅" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "message=Production deployment succeeded" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=❌" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "message=Production deployment failed" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Send notification
        run: |
          echo "${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} ${{ steps.status.outputs.message }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          # Replace with actual notification integration:
          # curl -X POST "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}" \
          #   -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          #   -d "{\"text\":\"${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} ${{ steps.status.outputs.message }} | Commit: ${{ github.sha }} | Actor: ${{ github.actor }}\"}"
